findings.disputed_by: own measurement, Playwright two-context frame comparison
findings.evidence: ANIMATING under no-preference (frames differ at 1.2s), STATIC under reduce (identical hashes). The library default already honours the preference; the auditor inferred a defect from an absent option in source rather than observing behaviour.
